zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan De Botetout於大約1356年出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親John Botetourt26歲，母親Katherine Weyland23歲。她於1377年與John Knyvet在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年在英國享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan De Botetout于大约1356年出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲John Botetourt26岁，母亲Katherine Weyland23岁。她于1377年与John Knyvet在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年在英国享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan De Botetout was born about 1356, in Suffolk, England, her father, John Botetourt, was 26 and her mother, Katherine Weyland, was 23. She married John Knyvet in 1377, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1417, in England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan De Botetout est née environ 1356, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Botetourt, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine Weyland, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Knyvet en 1377, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1417, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan De Botetout um 1356 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Botetourt 26 und ihre Mutter Katherine Weyland 23. Sie hat 1377 in Suffolk, England John Knyvet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 62 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Botetout è nata il circa 1356 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Botetourt, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Katherine Weyland, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Knyvet nel 1377, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1417, nel England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan De Botetoutが約1356年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父John Botetourtは26歳，母Katherine Weylandは23歳であった。1377年にイギリススフォルクでJohn Knyvetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年にイギリスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Botetout(이)가 대략 1356년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Botetourt(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Weyland(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1377년 영국 수폴크에서 John Knyvet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 영국에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Botetout nasceu aproximadamente 1356, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Botetourt, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Weyland, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Knyvet em 1377, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1417, em Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan De Botetout родилась около 1356 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Botetourt было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Weyland, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Knyvet в 1377 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1417 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan De Botetout nació aproximadamente 1356, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Botetourt, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Katherine Weyland, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Knyvet en 1377, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1417, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
